content.full_text:
April 30, 1990

Kathleen Donovan, Esq.
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 "J" Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, California 95814

Re: California League of Middle Schools Conference in Hawaii on June 27-29, 1990

Dear Ms. Donovan:

With respect to the above-referenced program, your advice is sought as to whether or not I may utilize campaign funds, pursuant to Government Code Section 85800, et seq., to pay for the cost of traveling to and from, attending, and participating in this program. I have attached a copy of a brochure which describes the program.

I would appreciate an answer from your office at your earliest convenience, since applications to participate in the program are due soon.

Should you have any questions, please contact me at (213) 625-6382.

Sincerely,

[Signature]
Rita Waters

RW:ew

Attachment

cc: Richard K. Mason, Esq.
